page.title: Settings
page.description: This page only contains core pricing, product API, and purchasing toggles. Auth, footer, shipping, pages, and help content now live in their own admin sections.

generalPage.title: Settings
generalPage.description: This page only contains core pricing, product API, and purchasing toggles. Auth, footer, shipping, pages, and help content now live in their own admin sections.

modules.notConfiguredDescription: The route /admin/{route} is registered by the admin shell but has no dedicated module yet.

modulePage.description: This module only contains settings related to {title}. Values are stored in the local SQLite Setting table for V1.0.

exchangeRateApiKey.label: ExchangeRate-API Key
exchangeRateApiKey.description: API key for https://www.exchangerate-api.com/ CNY latest rates.

enabledFrontendCurrencies.label: Frontend Currencies
enabledFrontendCurrencies.description: Comma-separated currency codes shown in the frontend currency switcher.

settlementCurrency.label: Settlement Currency
settlementCurrency.description: Source shopping and purchasing settlement currency.

exchangeRateUpdatedAt.label: Legacy Rate Updated At
exchangeRateUpdatedAt.description: Legacy manual timestamp retained for compatibility.

serviceFeeEnabled.label: Enable Service Fee
serviceFeeEnabled.description: Apply service fee to product pricing.

serviceFeeRate.label: Service Fee Rate
serviceFeeRate.description: Accepts decimal or percentage, for example 0.05 or 5.

minServiceFeeUsd.label: Minimum Service Fee
minServiceFeeUsd.description: Minimum service fee charged per order in USD.

manualPriceAdjustment.label: Allow Price Adjustment
manualPriceAdjustment.description: Allow admin or customer submitted price corrections.

siteName.label: Website Name
siteName.description: Brand name displayed in the frontend header and emails.

supportEmail.label: Support Email
supportEmail.description: Customer support mailbox used in the frontend floating bar and account pages.

floatingAppQrCodeUrl.label: Floating App QR Code URL
floatingAppQrCodeUrl.description: Public image URL used in the desktop floating bar download panel.

floatingIosDownloadUrl.label: Floating iOS Download URL
floatingIosDownloadUrl.description: App Store or TestFlight link used in the desktop floating bar.

floatingAndroidDownloadUrl.label: Floating Android Download URL
floatingAndroidDownloadUrl.description: Google Play or APK landing link used in the desktop floating bar.

floatingDiscordUrl.label: Floating Discord URL
floatingDiscordUrl.description: Discord community link used by the desktop floating bar.

defaultLanguage.label: Default Language
defaultLanguage.description: Default frontend UI language for first-time visitors.

adminLanguage.label: Admin Language
adminLanguage.description: Default language used in the admin console.

orderNoPrefix.label: Order Number Prefix
orderNoPrefix.description: Prefix used when generating order numbers.

packageNoPrefix.label: Package Number Prefix
packageNoPrefix.description: Prefix used when generating package numbers.

diyOrderEnabled.label: Enable DIY Order
diyOrderEnabled.description: Allow customers to submit manual quote requests.

maintenanceMode.label: Maintenance Mode
maintenanceMode.description: Reserve flag for temporary frontend maintenance.

oneboundGateway.label: OneBound Base URL
oneboundGateway.description: Gateway base URL for product parsing and search.

oneboundApiKey.label: OneBound API Key
oneboundApiKey.description: API key for item_get and item_search.

oneboundRetryCount.label: Retry Count
oneboundRetryCount.description: Retry attempts for transient gateway failures.

productCacheHours.label: Product Cache Hours
productCacheHours.description: How long product detail cache remains fresh.

searchCacheMinutes.label: Search Cache Minutes
searchCacheMinutes.description: Reserved cache TTL for keyword search results.

frontendLanguage.label: Frontend Source Language
frontendLanguage.description: Legacy setting kept only for backward compatibility. Frontend translations now come from local message files and database content.

translateLanguages.label: Frontend UI Locales
translateLanguages.description: Legacy setting kept only for backward compatibility. Active frontend locales now come from runtime locale configuration.
